are there any boats in america tht i can test drive

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Dear Sirs,

in attached the offer for out RIB42 and RIB55 with
hardtop and the technical
specifications.

Please note that the offer will expire at the end of
January since we
already have introduced a new price list.

I keep the occasion to inform you also that in case
you need till the end of
January we have in our store for maintenance the two
models of the boats
proposed that could be tested on the Como Lake by
your client.
